notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Sal Stewart reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Brandon Lowe. Edwin Arroyo scores.

notableEvents.label: Sal Stewart reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Sal Stewart reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Brandon Lowe. Edwin Arroyo scores.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Steer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Steer singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jake Mangum. Eugenio Suárez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Edwin Arroyo plunked
notableEvents.detail: Edwin Arroyo hit by pitch. Jose Trevino to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Elly De La Cruz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Elly De La Cruz grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Jared Triolo to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn. Edwin Arroyo out at 2nd. Elly De La Cruz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Elly De La Cruz rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Elly De La Cruz grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Jared Triolo to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn. Edwin Arroyo out at 2nd. Elly De La Cruz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Steer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Steer grounds into a force out, third baseman Nick Gonzales to second baseman Brandon Lowe. JJ Bleday out at 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Sal Stewart GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Sal Stewart grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Jared Triolo to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn. Edwin Arroyo to 3rd. Elly De La Cruz out at 2nd. Sal Stewart out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Sal Stewart rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Sal Stewart grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Jared Triolo to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn. Edwin Arroyo to 3rd. Elly De La Cruz out at 2nd. Sal Stewart out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Steer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Reds challenged (catcher interference), call on the field was overturned: Spencer Steer reaches on catcher interference by Endy Rodríguez. Spencer Steer to 1st.
